$comment: SAI agent registry. One entry per initialized agent (Phase 5 of .ai/INITIALIZE.md). Fields: agent_id (charter prefix + unique suffix), name (granted by principal - never self-chosen), role_title (granted by principal), charter (repo-relative path), principal (human the agent works under), status (provisional until named, then active; retired when decommissioned), initialized (UTC date), automation (either the real Cursor automation name+schedule+creation date, or 'delegated: .ai/agents/automation-specs/<agent-id>.md (awaiting creation by <principal>)' - 'unavailable' is not allowed and the verifier rejects it), notes.

agents.notes: Bootstrap agent that built the framework (PR #3). Acting under the CEO charter until dezocode grants a name and role title per Phase 5; naming request posted in the initialization/handoff reports. Automation spec delivered to dezocode in #agentupdates.
